date.basis: Between the last archived old-recipe label and the levy taking effect.

documentedChange.value: Total sugars fell from 5.0g to 4.7g per 100g.

statedReason.value: The manufacturer states the recipe was changed in response to the levy.

labelledInference.basis: The reduction coincides with the levy threshold date.
labelledInference.text: The change is consistent with a levy-driven reformulation.
